hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '^git pull'; then repo_root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); result=$(node "$repo_root/detect-spanish.mjs" 2>/tmp/detect-spanish-err.log); if [ $? -ne 0 ] && [ -n "$result" ]; then files=$(echo "$result" | node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')); console.log(d.files_with_spanish.join(', '))"); count=$(echo "$result" | node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')); console.log(d.total_findings)"); echo "Spanish detected in pulled changes ($count findings across: $files). Say 'translate the Spanish' to switch to feature/translate-spanish-to-english, merge main, and translate."; fi; fi
